<!-- e.g. Fixes #123, Closes #456 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📝 Documentation
- [ ] 🎨 UI / design
- [ ] ♻️  Refactor

<!-- Required for any UI change. Drag-and-drop images here. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally (`npm test` and/or `php artisan test`)
- [ ] Frontend builds (`npm run build`) if touched
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing behaviour changed
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] No secrets or personal data added to the repo
